# ATTAIR E2E Test Backlog
## Generated by Playwright MCP Crawl — 2026-04-08

### Legend
- **[BUG]** — Broken functionality, crash, or error
- **[VISUAL]** — UI/visual issue (layout, styling, missing assets)
- **[CONSOLE]** — JavaScript console error or warning
- **[UX]** — Usability issue (confusing flow, missing feedback)
- **[MISSING]** — Expected feature/element not present
- **[PERF]** — Performance issue (slow load, lag)

---

---

## Passing Tests (No Issues Found)

- **Style vibe picker**: All 12 aesthetics selectable/deselectable, gender toggle works, CTA button text updates correctly ("Pick at least 3" → "Continue with N picks"), disabled state enforced
- **Signup form**: Disabled CTA when fields empty, password show/hide toggle works, validation enables CTA when name+email+password filled, successful account creation
- **Bottom tab navigation**: All 5 tabs (Feed, Discover, Scan, Wardrobe, Profile) switch correctly with active state
- **Feed For You/Following toggle**: Works correctly, Following shows empty state with "Discover People" CTA for new users
- **Feed search**: Filters feed by keyword, clear button works
- **OOTW card**: Opens detail modal with cover image, description, Top 3 Looks
- **Scan upload**: File picker triggers, image preview shows, crop tool works (apply crop, back), circle-to-search hint shown
- **Scan error state**: Friendly error with tips and "Try another photo" recovery button
- **Profile bio editing**: Inline edit with textarea, char counter (0/200), save/cancel, persists to backend
- **Settings dialog**: Theme toggle (dark/light), 8-language i18n (all labels translate), budget range editor (presets + sliders + min/max inputs), size preferences (tops/bottoms/shoes/dresses), referral code display
- **Notifications panel**: Opens/closes correctly, shows empty state with enable CTA
- **Hanger Check**: Opens full-screen, shows "All Done!" when no outfits, Taste Profile empty state, History empty state, "Find Similar Items" button present
- **Feed card detail (reel)**: Opens horizontal scrollable carousel, shows outfit details, product cards with brand/price, like/share/shop/follow buttons

---

## Loop 2 Findings (new issues)

| # | Type | Screen | Description | Severity | Status |
|---|------|--------|-------------|----------|--------|
| 23 | [BUG] | Profile → Followers | Clicking "Followers" stat crashes entire app (black screen). `followListData.map is not a function` — API returns object not array when profile lookup fails (404). | Critical | **FIXED** |
| 24 | [BUG] | Profile → Following | Same crash pattern as #23 on the Following path | Critical | **FIXED** |
| 25 | [BUG] | PWA Banner | PWA banner z-index 201 overlaps Profile tab button — fixed by using marginBottom instead of z-index to avoid overlap | High | **FIXED** |
| 26 | [CONSOLE] | Feed | Two additional broken Unsplash images: `photo-1480429370612` and `photo-1558618666-fcd25c85e` (404) — in DB data, not code | Medium | Open |
| 27 | [VISUAL] | Feed | Orion E. card shows 👔 emoji instead of image (same broken-image pattern as Liam C.) | Medium | Open |

## Loop 2 Verified Fixes

All 9 fixes from Loop 1 confirmed working:
- [x] PWA banner close button — now uses marginBottom to avoid tab bar overlap
- [x] Hanger Check close button — z-index + larger tap target
- [x] Upgrade modal over reel — z-index 1200
- [x] Reel background pointer-events: none
- [x] Save limit message — dynamic text
- [x] Duplicate trial CTA — removed
- [x] Stripe checkout toast — uses showToast
- [x] Broken Unsplash image — replaced in script (DB data still references old URL)
- [x] File chooser cancel — handled gracefully
- [x] Rapid tab switching — no crashes or glitches
- [x] Followers/Following click — no crash, shows empty state

---

## Summary
- **Total issues found: 27** (22 from Loop 1 + 5 from Loop 2)
- Critical: 4 (Style Twins DB migration, Anthropic API key, Followers crash x2)
- High: 5 (PWA banner z-index x2, Hanger close z-index, upgrade modal z-index in reel, reel "Maybe later" z-index)
- Medium: 9 (broken social links x3, Unsplash 404 x4, rate limiting, Stripe error UX)
- Low: 6 (password form warning, interest count label, empty suggestions, scan error detail, duplicate trial CTA, duplicate feed entry)
- **Issues fixed in code: 12** (9 from Loop 1 + 3 from Loop 2)
- **Console errors observed: 17+** (across Unsplash 404s, API 500s, checkout failures, rate limiting)

## Root Causes (Backend Logs)

1. **Style Twins 500**: `column profiles.style_dna_cache does not exist` — needs a DB migration adding this column
2. **Identify 500**: `Anthropic API 401: invalid x-api-key` — the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in `.env` is expired/revoked
3. **Checkout 500**: `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY not set` — Stripe env vars not configured (expected for dev)
4. **Rate Limit 429**: `/api/user/saved` rate limit triggered during normal browsing — limit too aggressive

## Priority Fix Order

1. **Style Twins DB migration** (#13) — add `style_dna_cache` column to profiles table
2. **Z-index fixes** (#6, #10, #18, #21) — PWA banner, Hanger close, upgrade modal in reel overlay
3. **Broken Unsplash image** (#7, #22) — replace dead image URL
4. **Rate limit tuning** (#11) — increase `/api/user/saved` rate limit
5. **Social links** (#1-3) — update to real social media profiles or remove
6. **Upgrade modal UX** (#12, #19, #20) — fix save count, improve Stripe error, dedupe trial CTAs
7. **Feed duplicate** (#9) — investigate why Raven O. appears twice
8. **Broken card image** (#8) — Liam C. card missing outfit image
